lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Are you a member of the Group of Advanced Gardeners?

lines.speaker: Lammy Langle
lines.text: Why, yes I am. Why do you ask?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Martin has asked me to investigate why all the crops are failing.

lines.speaker: Lammy Langle
lines.text: No, I'm afraid I don't know anything about that.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Would you look after my crops for me?

lines.speaker: Lammy Langle
lines.text: You don't have a sapling planted in that patch. Plant one and I might agree to look after it for you.

lines.speaker: Lammy Langle
lines.text: That patch is already fully grown! I don't know what you want me to do with it!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can you give me any farming advice?

lines.speaker: Lammy Langle
lines.text: That depends on whether I have it to sell. What is it that you're looking for?

lines.speaker: Lammy Langle
lines.text: Sorry but you haven't solved the puzzle yet.

lines.speaker: Lammy Langle
lines.text: I'm too busy with my crops to work on this! Please solve it for me.
